title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at BSR & Co Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at BSR & Co Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
BSR & Co Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Amritsar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About BSR & Co Consulting Pvt Ltd:
BSR & Co Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSR & Co Consulting Pvt Ltd!
